data.body: EPIC 5fd2 (messy-moose-jig) CLOSED + CERTIFIED, with all 14 children closed+certified through the completion gate. Remediations driven by the gates: registry-from-prompt-library (criteria + pass prompts as contract-bearing library files + criteria_routing.json), G3/G4 container per-child loop, runtime size-handling ladder, ISF session-log + ticket-graph feeding, coaching-spec finding fields, sidecar retention prune + per-pass latency metrics, project-extensible coach moves, doc anti-drift test, the full standing eval suite (finder/verifier/ISF specs + T12 discrimination + observed-FP seed + FP6/FP7 prompt tuning), per-plan budget cap + centrality + cap-hit INDETERMINATE shedding + chunk-atomic checkpointing, and the sizing.py extraction (modules under the 800 cap). PR #10 (draft) carries all code; gate enabled in rebar.toml. Pending: final full-suite green → un-draft PR #10.
